title: Sprint 2
goal: User accounts, notifications, and content expansion

items.title: User auth (email sign-up + login)
items.notes: Backend done: Supabase Auth callback route, server-side session exchange. Needs login/signup UI (page or modal).

items.title: Favorites — save resorts, persist to Supabase
items.notes: DB table user_favorites exists with RLS. Needs frontend favorite button component and My Favorites view. Blocked on auth (s2-1).

items.title: Powder alert emails (new snow > 6in)
items.notes: Full pipeline built: Resend email templates (welcome + alert), subscribe/unsubscribe/manage/trigger API routes, alerts manage page, cron script. DB tables ready (alert_subscribers, alert_preferences, powder_alert_log). Needs live testing with real subscribers.

items.title: Automated SNOTEL ingestion (cron, no manual import)
items.notes: Sync script works (90 rows in snowpack_daily). Missing: deploy cron config (Vercel cron, GitHub Actions, or system crontab).

items.title: User-submitted conditions form (post to Supabase)
items.notes: Backend done: /api/user-conditions/submit route with validation, profanity filter, typed enums. DB table has 1 test row. Needs form UI on resort detail page.

items.title: Resort comparison page (/compare?r=a&b)
items.notes: Fully built: /compare route with query params, ComparePage component, up to 4 resorts side-by-side, dynamic metadata.

items.title: SEO: structured data (SkiResort schema.org)
items.notes: JSON-LD present on resort detail pages, OG/Twitter meta on layout + snow-report + map pages. May need SkiResort-specific schema fields (lifts, trails, snow depth).

items.title: Add 50+ more resorts to dataset
items.notes: 128 resorts in DB. Import scripts ready (import-resorts.ts, import-resorts-standalone.mjs). Original target likely met — verify if expansion beyond 128 is still needed.

items.title: Analytics: PostHog event tracking on key actions
items.notes: PostHog provider in layout, client in lib/posthog.tsx. Events tracked in BrowsePage, SummitResortCard, ResortDetailPage, ConditionVoter. Review if more events needed.

items.title: Social share card (OG image per resort)
items.notes: OG meta tags on multiple pages. generate-images.mjs script exists. Verify if per-resort dynamic OG images are being generated and served.
